query:
UPDATE grading_jobs
        SET status = $2,
            finished_at = $1,
            lease_expires_at = NULL,
            failure_reason = $5,
            failure_message = 'job lease expired and max attempts were exhausted',
            failure_retryable = false
        WHERE status IN ($3, $4)
          AND lease_expires_at <= $1
          AND cancel_requested_at IS NULL
          AND attempts >= max_attempts
